_comment: Drop-in snippet for VS Code. User scope: Command Palette -> 'MCP: Open User Configuration' opens your user mcp.json - paste the keys below. Workspace scope: save as <repo>/.vscode/mcp.json. Replace the URL; VS Code prompts for the token on first start (it is never stored in this file). Note VS Code's top-level key is 'servers' - not 'mcpServers', and ~/.vscode/mcp.json is NOT a location VS Code reads.
